_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: We also utilized CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing to generate indel mutations within exon 3 of NF1 in wild‐type immortalized human Schwann cells (ipn02.3 2λ)
details: Used as wild-type immortalized human Schwann cells for CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing to generate NF1-deficient cell lines
